entity: Children and Youth Behavioral Health Initiative

entity_evidence.text: the development of a video series to provide parents with resources and skills to support their children's mental health and to develop next generation digital supports for remote mental health assessment and intervention as a component of the Children and Youth Behavioral Health Initiative
